Overview In this session you will:
Do practice problems Use the solutions to check your work Problems Set Use Applications of Differentiation (PDF) to do the problems below.
Section Topic Exercises 2G Mean Value Theorem 1b, 2b, 5, 6 Use Integration (PDF) to do the problems below.
Section Topic Exercises 3A Differentials, indefinite integration 1d, 1e, 2a, 2c, 2e, 2g, 2i, 2k, 3a, 3c, 3e, 3g 3F Differential equations: Separation of variables 1c, 1d, 2a, 2e, 4b, 4c, 4d, 8b Solutions Solutions to Applications of Differentiation problems (PDF)
Solutions to Integration problems (PDF)
This problem set is from exercises and solutions written by David Jerison and Arthur Mattuck.
